options: Indian Railway Catering and Tourism Corporation (IRCTC) /

options: A missile destroyer commissioned by the Indian Navy /
An air defence missile system of the Indian Navy /

questions.statement: With which country has India partnered to enable real-time cross-border remittances by linking UPI with the country&rsquo;s Electronic Fund Transfer System (EFTS) through the Fawri+ service?

options: P. K. Srivastava; Ministry of External Affairs /
Praveen Vashista; Ministry of Home Affairs /

questions.statement: The MoU signed between India and the Netherlands on maritime heritage cooperation primarily supports which project in India?

options: To test the infantry capabilities of the newly formed RUDRA Brigade /
To conduct routine desert warfare drills with armoured units /
To showcase humanitarian assistance and disaster relief procedures /
To validate integrated multi-domain operations across land, air, and technological domains /

questions.statement: Which statement correctly describes the Pradhan Mantri Rashtriya Bal Puraskar 2025 presented in New Delhi?
options: It honours children below 18 for achievements across six categories /
It is awarded only for acts of bravery /
It replaced the National Sports Awards /
It is limited to achievements in science and technology /
